nodes.name: q15-simple.sql
nodes.summary: Simplified Nexmark Q15 query creating a materialized view that counts bids and computes sum of prices per day, omitting the channel grouping.

nodes.name: q15-two-phase.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized views created by the two-phase variant of Nexmark Q15.

nodes.name: q15-two-phase.sql
nodes.summary: Two-phase aggregation variant of Nexmark Q15 that splits computation into partial and final aggregation stages for better parallelism.

nodes.name: q15.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q15 query.

nodes.name: q15.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q15 benchmark query creating a materialized view counting bids and summing prices per channel per day with multi-level bucketing.

nodes.name: q16-no-distinct.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the no-distinct variant of Nexmark Q16.

nodes.name: q16-no-distinct.sql
nodes.summary: Variant of Nexmark Q16 without DISTINCT operations, computing bidder statistics per channel per day without deduplication.

nodes.name: q16.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q16 query.

nodes.name: q16.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q16 benchmark query computing bidder statistics (count, sum, max) per channel per day, using DISTINCT over bid windows.

nodes.name: q17.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q17 query.

nodes.name: q17.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q17 benchmark query grouping auction bid statistics by auction ID and day, tracking count and price ranges.

nodes.name: q18-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q18.

nodes.name: q18-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q18 that deduplicates bids by keeping the latest bid per bidder per auction, restricted to a recent time window.

nodes.name: q18.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q18 query.

nodes.name: q18.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q18 benchmark query deduplicating bids by keeping the most recent bid per bidder per auction using ROW_NUMBER.

nodes.name: q19-temporal-filter.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view for the temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q19.

nodes.name: q19-temporal-filter.sql
nodes.summary: Temporal-filter variant of Nexmark Q19 selecting top-N bids per auction, restricted to a recent time window.

nodes.name: q19.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q19 query.

nodes.name: q19.sql
nodes.summary: Nexmark Q19 benchmark query selecting the top-N highest bids per auction using ROW_NUMBER window function.

nodes.name: q2.drop.sql
nodes.summary: Teardown script that drops the materialized view created by the standard Nexmark Q2 query.
